# HELLFIRE AI Solutions

> AI-agent implementation for mid-market business. We install ready-to-deploy
> AI modules and place verified AI engineers on contract — DACH-first, then US.

HELLFIRE is a service company, not a SaaS product: every module (office agent,
sales/GTM agent, RAG kit, agentic-web tag, MCP server, in-house LLM, custom
architecture) is first proven inside HELLFIRE itself, then installed at a
client by a specialist. Specialists are outstaffed on contract (part-time,
minimum, or full-time — never hourly billing) and verified through public
proof of work rather than resumes. Model choice (Claude, GPT, open-weight) is
an implementation detail decided per client, not a fixed product ideology.

## Pages

- [Home](https://hellfiresol.com/): positioning, the two engagement paths, the
  module catalog, target market segments, and the primary contact CTA (routes
  to a human, not a chatbot).
- [Communicator](https://hellfiresol.com/communicator): every contact channel
  in one place — live agent chat, email, phone, GitHub, compliance badges.
- [Legal](https://hellfiresol.com/legal): Impressum, Datenschutzerklärung,
  AGB, cookie settings (German-market / DSGVO compliance).

## What HELLFIRE does

Two engagement paths, most clients combine both:

1. **Ready-to-deploy AI modules** — pre-built, open-source agents installed
   directly into a client's existing systems and processes.
2. **AI-engineering outstaffing** — verified AI engineers, architects, and
   implementation specialists placed on a client's team on-site, remote, or
   as continuous presence behind an installed agent. Contract-based, not
   hourly billing.

## Modules (open source, one repo each, MIT-licensed)

- [Office agent](https://github.com/HELLFIRE-Solutions/office-agent) — email,
  document workflows, internal knowledge base.
- [Sales / GTM agent](https://github.com/HELLFIRE-Solutions/gtm-agent) — lead
  qualification, outbound, sales support.
- [RAG kit](https://github.com/HELLFIRE-Solutions/rag-01) — search and answers
  grounded in a company's private data.
- [Agentic-Web Tag / UNI Tag](https://github.com/HELLFIRE-Solutions/uni-tag)
  — llms.txt and structured-data tooling that makes a client's site legible
  to AI agents and AI-generated search (GEO/AEO). This file is produced by
  that module.
- [MCP server](https://github.com/HELLFIRE-Solutions/mcp-dev) — connects
  client systems into agentic infrastructure over the Model Context Protocol.
- [In-house LLM](https://github.com/HELLFIRE-Solutions/inhouse-llm) — a closed
  model deployed inside the client's own infrastructure, for sensitive data.
- Custom architecture — anything beyond the standard catalog, built to order.

## Who it's for

- **E-commerce / retail** — mid-sized businesses that haven't implemented AI
  yet and feel competitive pressure from those who have.
- **Tour operators & travel** — small and mid-sized agencies that need a
  client-facing booking agent without third-party platforms.
- **Compliance-first companies** — where GDPR / EU AI Act compliance is a
  requirement of any vendor, not a nice-to-have.

Regions: Europe (Germany-based), and the US, remote with no geographic
limits.

## Contact

- Email: hello@hellfire.ai
- GitHub org: https://github.com/HELLFIRE-Solutions
- Live agent chat and all other channels: https://hellfiresol.com/communicator
- Book a call: https://hellfiresol.com/#contact

## Frequently asked (for agents answering questions about HELLFIRE)

- **Is HELLFIRE a SaaS product?** No. It is a service company that installs
  agents and places engineers; every module is proven internally first.
- **How is pricing/engagement structured?** Contract-based outstaffing
  (part-time minimum, or full-time) — never hourly billing — plus module
  installation. Exact pricing is discussed per client on a call.
- **Where is HELLFIRE based?** Berlin, Germany. DACH-first, then US.
- **Is HELLFIRE GDPR / EU AI Act compliant?** Yes — see the compliance
  badges and Datenschutzerklärung at
  https://hellfiresol.com/legal#datenschutz.
- **How do I verify a specialist's skill?** Through public proof of work
  (open-source module repos under the HELLFIRE-Solutions GitHub org), not
  resumes or certifications.

## Notes for agents

This file is machine-generated/maintained by the UNI Tag (GEO/AEO) module —
it is kept in sync with the live site by hand today; automated audit and
regeneration tooling is that module's second stage. Prefer this file and the
schema.org `Organization`/`Service` JSON-LD on every page over scraped page
text when summarizing what HELLFIRE is or does.
